titleStmt.title: SII 34.57: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 57. Tiruvaigāvūr, Papanasam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bilvanātēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Tribhuvanavīradēva (Kulōttuṅga III), 33rd year, Mithuna, badi, 9, Monday, Rēvati = A.D. 1211, June 6, Monday.

A woman called Andappulaperumāḷ wife of Anapāyavaṇukkaṉ and her daughter had to sell their dēvadāna land in Edirilichōḻa-nallūr, measuring one vēli and odd, and two houses for 28,800 kāsu for paying off the arrears of the taxes due on their holding. For the sale, one Chērapāṇḍiyan Tambirān-aṇukkaṉ acted as the male guardian (mudukaṇ). The default in the payment was found out by Piḷḷai Muṉaiyadaraiyar who was in charge of the temple lands, by auditing the accounts from the 24th to 33rd year (of the king).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉa cakravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭu vīrar AbhiṣEkamum vicaiyar AbhiṣEkamum paṇṇiyaruḷina śrī tribhuvaṉa vīradevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattu mūṉṟāvatu mituṉa nāyaṟṟu Apara pakṣattu navamiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rEvati nāḷ vaṭakarai vikkiramacOḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Aṇṭāṭuk kūṟṟattu tiruvaikāvūr Uṭaiyār tiruvaikāvuṭaiyār kOyil Āti caṇṭEśvara tEvarkaṉmikaḷukku Irājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭu Araicūruṭaiyānaraiyaṉ poyyāta muḻu nāṉa Aṉapāyavaṇukkaṟku pukka AntappulaperumāḷEṉum Eṉmakaḷ kOṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ nakarīśvaramuṭaiyānāṉa vicaiya kaṅkaṟku ḷenum Enṟu pāṇṭi kulācaṉivaḷa nāṭṭu Aṇṭāṭṭuk kūṟṟattu Araiyānaraiyaṉ pEriyāṇṭaiyānāna cErapāṇṭiyaṉ tampirānaṇukkaṉai mutukaṇṇākak koṇṭu nila vilaipramāṇa Icaivutīṭṭu Iṟṟai nāḷāl nāṉ caṇṭEśvarap peruvilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamu Iṟaiili ninṟa maṉaiyumāvatu
Innāyanār tēvatānam Etirili cōḻanallūril Eṅkaḷ mātākkaḷ Ivvantappula perumāḷ pakkal śrītanam peṟṟuṭaiyēnāy Eṉṉutāyaṉupavittu varukiṟa pottakappaṭi nilam 10 4 Innilamoṉṟē nālumāk kāṇiyaraikkāṇik kīḻ muṉṟumāvaraik kāṇikkum Irupattu nālāvatu pacāṉ mutal muppattu mūṉṟāvatu pacāṉ varaiyum Ināyanār kōyil paṟṟuppiṭitta piḷḷai muṉaiyataraiyar kūṭattuk kaṇakkup pāttuk kaṭamaiyāṉa kācukkun nellukkum minta nilam śrītaṉam peṟṟa kōṭṭūruṭaiyā nakarīśvaramuṭaiyānāṉa vicaiyakaṅkaru meṅkaḷālu miccikai yiṟukka voṇṇāmaiyālum piḷḷai muṉaiyataraiyarkkuk kēṭṭuk kaṭavatāṉa kācukkum nellukkum koḷḷa niccayitta kācu 2 10000 8 1000 8 100 Ikkācu Irupatteṇṇāyirat teṇṇūṟṟukkum Innāyaṉār tēvatāṉam Etirili cōḻa nallūril Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa pottakappaṭi nilam Oṉṟēnālu mākkāṇi yaraikkāṇik kīḻ mūṉṟu māvaraikkāṇiyum tiruvaikāvūril teṟkil tiruvītiyil
teṉciṟakil ppāṭiyuṭaiyā naraiyaṉ kaṅkaikoṇṭa cō ṇikkuk kiḻakkum Akampaṭiyār maṉaikku mēṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa Iṟaiyili maṉai 2 Immaṉaiyiraṇṭum Āka Innilamum Immaṉaiyum Innāyanāṟkuc caṇṭēśvarapperum vilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttōm Āticaṇṭēśvaradevar kaṉmikaḷukkum cērapāṇṭiyan tampirāṉaṇukkarai mutukaṇṇāka vuṭaiya Antappulap perumāḷum Uyya vantāḷum Ivviruvōm viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷaṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 2 10000 1000 6 100 Ikkācu Irupattōrāyirat taṟunūṟukkumē vilaiyāvatāka viṟṟukkuṭuttōm Intac cērapāṇṭiyatampirāṉaṇukkaraimutukaṇṇākavuṭaiya Antappulapperumāḷum Innilañ cītanam peṟṟa Uyyavantāḷum Ivviruvōm Innilattukkum Ivviṟaiyili maṉai yiraṇṭukkum Ituvē vilaiyāvatākavu mitu vallatu vēṟu poruḷ māvaṟuti poruṭccilavōlai kāṭṭakkaṭavatallātitākavu Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai
pramāṇa Icaivu tīṭṭuk kuṭuttOm Innāyanār kOyil Āti caṇṭEśvara tEvarkaṉmikaḷukku IvviruvOm Innilattukku mEnOkkiṉa maramum kīḻ nOkkiṉa kiṇaṟum potuvum potāriyum pākāciriyaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttOm Orukkālāvatum Irukkālāvatum mukkālāvatum vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu poruḷ koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivu tīṭṭuk kuṭuttOm Intac cErapāṇṭiyaṉ tampirānaṇukkarai mutukaṇṇākavuṭaiya Antappulapperumāḷum Uyyavantāḷum IvviruvOm Ivarkaḷ paṇikka pramāṇa Icaivu tīṭṭu EḻutiṉEṉ Ūrkkaṇakku neṟpukkai Uṭaiyāṉ nāṟpatteṇṇāyirap piriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Innilam O na kka mūṉṟumāvaraikkāṇiyum Iṟaiyili nattam maṉai Iraṇṭum mEśvaratEvar tirunāmam
Digital edition of SII 34.57 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
